primary.description: Deep Slate for solid, grounded primary actions

accent.description: Safety Orange for critical actions, alerts, and active states

success.description: Emerald for optimized routes and stock healthy

warning.description: Amber for low stock and delays

destructive.description: Red for critical errors and delete actions

cards.style: Flat, 1px border, no shadow by default
cards.classes: bg-white border border-border rounded-lg overflow-hidden transition-all duration-200 hover:shadow-md hover:border-slate-300
cards.header_classes: px-6 py-4 border-b border-border bg-slate-50/50 flex items-center justify-between

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-transform active:scale-95 shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-transparent hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.icon: h-10 w-10 p-0 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground transition-colors

inputs.classes: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-accent focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

tables.header_classes: border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted h-10 px-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-muted-foreground bg-slate-50

status_badges.success: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-transparent bg-emerald-100 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-emerald-800 transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2
status_badges.warning: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-transparent bg-amber-100 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-amber-800 transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2
status_badges.destructive: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-transparent bg-red-100 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-red-800 transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2
status_badges.neutral: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-transparent bg-slate-100 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-slate-800 transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

sections: Picking Efficiency Chart (Right col, 2 row span)

picking_routes.features: Step-by-step picking instructions list on the side

orders.features: Drag-and-drop status updates, detailed order modal

general: Use the 'Swiss Industrial' theme: lots of white space, strong borders, bold typography.
Implement the 'Bento Grid' for the dashboard using CSS Grid.
Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds, stick to flat colors or subtle patterns.
components: Customize Shadcn components to match the 'Safety Orange' and 'Slate' palette.
Override default Shadcn radii to 'rounded-md' or 'rounded-lg' but keep buttons slightly sharper.
Use 'Sheet' component for mobile navigation and detailed views.
animations: Use 'framer-motion' for page transitions and list staggering.
Add hover effects to all cards and buttons.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in '/app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx'
